records.text:
Alone duration (min): 2
Peak distress (0-5): 4

Baseline only: camera check during a very short door close. Barking started quickly, pacing at door, recovered with food scatter after return.

Next session: reduce duration and simplify cues before increasing again.

Alone duration (min): 2
Peak distress (0-5): 3

Repeated 6 tiny exits under one minute plus one 2 minute trial. Less frantic at return when keys were handled earlier.

Next session: reduce duration and simplify cues before increasing again.

Alone duration (min): 3
Peak distress (0-5): 3

Added mat settle before exit. One whine at 90 seconds, then sniffed towel. Ended before barking.

Next session: reduce duration and simplify cues before increasing again.

Alone duration (min): 3
Peak distress (0-5): 3

Departure cue warmup: shoes, coat, sit down again. Final 3 minute absence stayed below bark threshold.

Next session: reduce duration and simplify cues before increasing again.

Alone duration (min): 4
Peak distress (0-5): 3

Four short reps. Mild pacing first minute, took stuffed Kong after 2 minutes. Recovery under one minute.

Next session: reduce duration and simplify cues before increasing again.

Alone duration (min): 5
Peak distress (0-5): 3

First 5 minute target. One window check and brief whine, no scratching. Kept next rep shorter.

Next session: reduce duration and simplify cues before increasing again.

Alone duration (min): 6
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Settled on mat after handler stepped out. Ate most of food puzzle; no vocalizing on camera.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 6
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Practiced with normal bag and keys routine. Calm sniffing, then lying by hallway. Return stayed neutral.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 7
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Slight startle from hallway noise but recovered without escalation. Maintained loose body.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 8
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Best early session: watched door for 30 seconds, then worked chew. Ended at 8 minutes.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 7
Peak distress (0-5): 3

Small regression after weekend schedule change. Whined twice and paced, so dropped duration and used easier setup.

Next session: reduce duration and simplify cues before increasing again.

Alone duration (min): 9
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Back to sub-threshold. Pre-exit relaxation protocol helped; one yawn, no barking.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 10
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Reached 10 minutes. Dog alternated between bed and chew, checked door once.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 12
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Added mailbox walk route. Stayed relaxed through elevator sound, minor ear perk only.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 13
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Longer food puzzle lasted 9 minutes. Last 4 minutes quiet resting near bed.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 15
Peak distress (0-5): 2

First 15 minute absence. Brief sit by door at minute 12, then returned to mat.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 14
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Consolidation day with two reps. No vocalizing; soft body language throughout.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 16
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Handler varied exit door timing. Dog noticed but stayed with chew.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 18
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Mild pacing during final 2 minutes but no bark or scratch. Recovery immediate.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 20
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Reached 20 minutes. Dog lay down after minute 5 and remained mostly settled.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 18
Peak distress (0-5): 3

Rain and trash truck raised arousal. Cut session at 18 minutes after whining began.

Next session: reduce duration and simplify cues before increasing again.

Alone duration (min): 22
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Returned to quiet conditions. Watched door briefly, then rested. Good reset after trigger day.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 24
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Introduced realistic pre-departure movement for 10 minutes before exit. Stayed below threshold.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 25
Peak distress (0-5): 2

25 minutes with low arousal. One reposition, no vocalizing, ate chew slowly.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 28
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Added coat and car start sound. Alerted to sound but settled within 40 seconds.

Next session: repeat or add 1-3 minutes only if body language stays loose.

Alone duration (min): 30
Peak distress (0-5): 2

First 30 minute target. Quiet resting for final half of session.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 32
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Slightly longer than previous, same setup. Calm door check at minute 20.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 35
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Food puzzle removed halfway by design. Dog rested without needing continuous food.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 38
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Mild hallway noise, no escalation. Body loose, no panting.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 40
Peak distress (0-5): 1

Strong session. Mostly asleep by camera from minute 14 to return.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 36
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Maintenance drop after 40 minute win. Calm; used easier absence to protect confidence.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 42
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Stretched to 42 minutes. One brief whine at neighbor door, then settled.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 45
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Calm for most of absence. Stood at door when handler returned but no distress signs.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 48
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Longer grocery-style absence. Dog moved between bed and water bowl, no vocalizing.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 50
Peak distress (0-5): 1

50 minutes with low distress. Slept through middle third.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 45
Peak distress (0-5): 3

Regression after missed walk and windy weather. Pacing and two whines, ended early.

Next session: reduce duration and simplify cues before increasing again.

Alone duration (min): 46
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Recovery session after regression. Extra decompression walk first; remained under threshold.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 52
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Returned to progression. Calm sniffing, then bed. No door scratching.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 55
Peak distress (0-5): 2

55 minutes. Dog alert for delivery sound but did not escalate.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 60
Peak distress (0-5): 2

First 1 hour session. Mostly settled; brief standing stretch at minute 44.

Next session: vary normal departure cues while keeping distress at 0-2.

Alone duration (min): 58
Peak distress (0-5): 1

Maintenance rep below max. Relaxed from start and ignored pre-departure cues.

Next session: increase by 3-5 minutes or run an easier consolidation rep.

Alone duration (min): 65
Peak distress (0-5): 2

65 minutes with realistic errand timing. Quiet throughout, mild anticipation at return.

Next session: vary normal departure cues while keeping distress at 0-2.

Alone duration (min): 70
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Dog slept for about 35 minutes. No pacing clusters.

Next session: vary normal departure cues while keeping distress at 0-2.

Alone duration (min): 75
Peak distress (0-5): 2

75 minute absence. Checked door after hallway voices, recovered quickly.

Next session: vary normal departure cues while keeping distress at 0-2.

Alone duration (min): 80
Peak distress (0-5): 2

Longer weekend session. Took water, rested on rug, no vocalizing.

Next session: vary normal departure cues while keeping distress at 0-2.

Alone duration (min): 75
Peak distress (0-5): 1

Consolidation at 75 minutes. Very low arousal; settled before handler fully left.

Next session: vary normal departure cues while keeping distress at 0-2.

Alone duration (min): 85
Peak distress (0-5): 2

85 minutes. Mild alerting at neighbor noise but no bark. Returned to bed.

Next session: vary normal departure cues while keeping distress at 0-2.
